Bash(cd "/Users/devansh.sharma/Documents/Detractor_analysis" && python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\('pnm_experience_dump_2026-03-09-1530.csv', low_memory=False\)
print\('Shape:', df.shape\)
print\('CLASSIFICATION:', df['CLASSIFICATION'].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)\)
print\('Overall detractor rate:', round\(df['CLASSIFICATION'].eq\('Detractor'\).mean\(\)*100, 2\), '%'\)
print\(\)
print\('TOTAL_TICKETS range:', df['TOTAL_TICKETS'].min\(\), '-', df['TOTAL_TICKETS'].max\(\)\)
print\('CUSTOMER_TICKETS range:', df['CUSTOMER_TICKETS'].min\(\), '-', df['CUSTOMER_TICKETS'].max\(\)\)
print\('SPRINKLR_SESSION_COUNT range:', df['SPRINKLR_SESSION_COUNT'].min\(\), '-', df['SPRINKLR_SESSION_COUNT'].max\(\)\)
print\('PICKUP_FLOOR range:', df['PICKUP_FLOOR'].min\(\), '-', df['PICKUP_FLOOR'].max\(\)\)
print\('FINAL_FARE range:', df['FINAL_FARE'].min\(\), '-', df['FINAL_FARE'].max\(\)\)
print\('FINAL_CFT range:', df['FINAL_CFT'].min\(\), '-', df['FINAL_CFT'].max\(\)\)
print\('DRY_RUN_DISTANCE_KMS range:', df['DRY_RUN_DISTANCE_KMS'].dropna\(\).min\(\), '-', df['DRY_RUN_DISTANCE_KMS'].dropna\(\).max\(\)\)
print\('AVG_RESOLUTION_TAT range:', df['AVG_RESOLUTION_TAT'].dropna\(\).min\(\), '-', df['AVG_RESOLUTION_TAT'].dropna\(\).max\(\)\)
")
